final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a clean, modern, globally neutral aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear focal center
Subject: must include visual elements representing the three content pillars: new energy vehicles, digital/tech products, and lifestyle goods — balanced and harmonious as a unified icon
Scene/backdrop: needs a simple, uncluttered backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a fresh, approachable, tech-forward atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a universally appealing, cross-culturally neutral direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must avoid any symbols, gestures, color combinations, or imagery that carry negative or taboo connotations in any major culture or religion; must work visually at small avatar sizes
Avoid: must avoid human faces, political symbols, religious iconography, culturally specific gestures, and any imagery that could be offensive to specific groups
